steps.title: Quiet Call
steps.text: The heir hears a weak answer, but rats fat on gravewax answer from another direction.

steps.text: Stone, thorns, tide, or locked iron blocks the path and demands a class-flavored solution.

choices.label: Find Another Way

steps.title: Carry or Clear
steps.text: The heir chooses to carry the rescued target slowly or clear danger first.

steps.title: Breakout
steps.text: The last obstacle attacks during escape; losing may kill the heir or the target.

steps.title: Returned Alive
steps.text: sister Elowen pays through tears, and the line gains rank XP for saving Misty, the widow's soot-gray cat.

steps.text: The guild pays, but the heir may carry a dungeon mark into later runs.

missions.name: The Snow Bride's Procession
missions.description: a frost-bitten courier  — a veiled bride walking uphill in summer snow  — icebound vows

steps.title: Departure Oath
steps.text: a frost-bitten courier entrusts a veiled bride walking uphill in summer snow to the heir under guild witness.

steps.title: Road Temper
steps.text: The escorted party reveals a flaw, fear, or secret before danger appears.

steps.title: First Delay
steps.text: Weather, mud, gossip, or a closed gate threatens the schedule.

steps.title: Watcher Sign
steps.text: The heir spots icebound vows tracking the party.

steps.title: Meal by Bad Light
steps.text: A rest scene tests morale and lets the heir ask why the escort matters.

steps.title: Ambush Geometry
steps.text: The route narrows into a tactical choice: protect the charge, flank, or flee.

steps.title: The Hidden Cargo
steps.text: The escort changes meaning when the heir learns payment is partly cursed unless purified before banking.

steps.title: No Clean Path
steps.text: One path is safe but slow; the other is dangerous but may preserve the full reward.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: One path is safe but slow; the other is dangerous but may pr

steps.title: Final Gate
steps.text: The destination itself rejects entry until a vow, bribe, or skill check succeeds.

steps.title: Witnessed Arrival
steps.text: The guild records successful escort and pays according to survival and honesty.

missions.name: Smugglers of the Salted Dead
missions.description: the lighthouse widow  — coffins moved through the harbor as contraband  — storm hags

steps.title: Quiet Writ
steps.text: the lighthouse widow wants coffins moved through the harbor as contraband ruined without open guild scandal.

steps.title: Pattern Study
steps.text: The heir watches guards, tides, bells, or patrols to find the weak hour.

steps.title: Tool Choice
steps.text: Poison, false order, fire, lockwork, or prayer gives different risk profiles.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: Poison, false order, fire, lockwork, or prayer gives differe

steps.title: Inside Help
steps.text: An insider helps only if paid, threatened, forgiven, or promised escape.

steps.title: Unexpected Innocent
steps.text: A bystander stands inside the blast radius of the plan.

steps.title: Why It Exists
steps.text: The heir learns the final clue only appears after dusk, complicating the job.

steps.title: Silent Strike
steps.text: The sabotage attempt demands dexterity, intelligence, class, or luck.

steps.title: Alarm Breaks
steps.text: The alarm sounds anyway and storm hags respond.

steps.title: Evidence Burn
steps.text: Destroy proof, preserve proof, or frame a rival.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: Destroy proof, preserve proof, or frame a rival.

steps.title: No Applause
steps.text: The guild pays discreetly; infamy may rise even on perfect success.

missions.name: The Reed Witch's Dowry
missions.description: reed-cutter Faye  — a dowry chest demanded by a fen witch  — reed witches

steps.title: Terms on the Board
steps.text: reed-cutter Faye needs the heir to bargain over a dowry chest demanded by a fen witch, not simply draw steel.

steps.title: Know the Other Side
steps.text: The heir learns what reed witches actually want.

steps.title: Token of Good Faith
steps.text: Bring a gift, hostage, oath, or insult; each changes the negotiation table.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: Bring a gift, hostage, oath, or insult; each changes the neg

steps.title: Neutral Ground
steps.text: The meeting place itself threatens both sides.

steps.title: Opening Demand
steps.text: The opposing party asks for more than the client admitted was possible.

steps.title: Buried Clause
steps.text: The old law or pact reveals a rival heir already failed here and left a warning mark.

steps.title: Bad Actor
steps.text: Someone tries to ruin the talks with sudden violence.

steps.title: Final Offer
steps.text: The heir can choose peace, profit, humiliation, or war.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: The heir can choose peace, profit, humiliation, or war.

steps.title: Oath Binding
steps.text: The agreement binds magically; breaking it later may trigger a secret event.

steps.title: Signed Before Witness
steps.text: The guild pays for settlement, with infamy, morale, or bloodline effects based on terms.

missions.name: The Old Keep's Missing Stair
missions.description: guild historian Emre  — a staircase stolen from a ruined keep  — statue sentries

steps.title: Written Claim
steps.text: guild historian Emre claims a staircase stolen from a ruined keep must be recovered before rival hands reach it.

steps.title: Owner's Mark
steps.text: The heir identifies the object's mark and one unsettling sign of statue sentries nearby.

steps.title: Price of Entry
steps.text: A guard, lock, tide, or curse demands supplies, gold, or a stat check.

steps.title: Competing Hand
steps.text: A second claimant offers coin to walk away from the contract.

steps.title: Container Trap
steps.text: The object's case is trapped; rogues, mages, and clerics each see different warnings.

steps.title: True Provenance
steps.text: A hidden inscription reveals the safest route would abandon someone helpless.

steps.title: Weight of the Thing
steps.text: Carrying a staircase stolen from a ruined keep burdens the heir: speed, stealth, or morale must be sacrificed.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: Carrying a staircase stolen from a ruined keep burdens the h

steps.title: The Pursuit
steps.text: statue sentries pursue the recovered object through the ruins scene.

steps.title: Clean Hands
steps.text: The heir decides whether to reveal the truth, hide it, or mark the client as suspect.

steps.title: Sealed Receipt
steps.text: The guild issues pay and rank XP; the item may also unlock a later secret event.

missions.name: The Prisoner with No Name
missions.description: a prisoner's mother  — a nameless prisoner erased from the gaol book  — gaoler shades

steps.title: Frantic Posting
steps.text: a prisoner's mother begs the heir to recover a nameless prisoner erased from the gaol book; delay lowers the rescue reward.

steps.title: Last Sighting
steps.text: A child, track, or dropped token places the missing soul at the edge of the dungeon scene.

steps.title: False Trail
steps.text: A tempting trail wastes supplies unless the heir passes luck or intelligence.

steps.title: Quiet Call
steps.text: The heir hears a weak answer, but gaoler shades answer from another direction.

steps.title: Blocked Reach
steps.text: Stone, thorns, tide, or locked iron blocks the path and demands a class-flavored solution.

steps.title: The Captor's Reason
steps.text: The mission turns when the heir learns the client omits a blood debt owed by their grandparent.

steps.title: Breath and Panic
steps.text: The rescued target panics; charisma, faith, or a gentle item can prevent injury.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: The rescued target panics; charisma, faith, or a gentle item

steps.title: Carry or Clear
steps.text: The heir chooses to carry the rescued target slowly or clear danger first.

steps.title: Breakout
steps.text: The last obstacle attacks during escape; losing may kill the heir or the target.

steps.title: Returned Alive
steps.text: a prisoner's mother pays through tears, and the line gains rank XP for saving a nameless prisoner erased from the gaol book.

missions.name: The Road That Collects Shoes
missions.description: carter Unn  — a road lined with empty shoes facing west  — hungry bridges

steps.title: Thin Notice
steps.text: The board notice says little; carter Unn fears the truth around a road lined with empty shoes facing west more than the cost.

steps.title: Interview One
steps.text: The first witness lies badly, revealing pressure from hungry bridges.

steps.title: Physical Clue
steps.text: A mark, smell, or damaged object anchors the mystery in the road scene.

steps.title: Contradiction
steps.text: The heir finds evidence that makes the client's version impossible.

steps.title: Street or Trail Pressure
steps.text: Someone tries to scare the heir away with poison, ambush, or public shame.

steps.title: Old Record
steps.text: A ledger, gravestone, map, or hymn reveals payment is partly cursed unless purified before banking.

steps.title: Accusation
steps.text: The heir can accuse openly, bait a confession, or keep silent for more evidence.

steps.title: Proof Under Fire
steps.text: The culprit or curse lashes out when proof is taken.

steps.title: Judgment Call
steps.text: The heir chooses guild law, local mercy, or profitable blackmail.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: The heir chooses guild law, local mercy, or profitable black

steps.title: Filed Truth
steps.text: The completed report grants pay, rank XP, and possible infamy shift.

missions.name: Underchapel of the Ninth Bell
missions.description: a mourner in black gloves  — the chapel vault below the ninth bell rope  — restless ancestors

steps.title: Key and Map
steps.text: a mourner in black gloves gives the heir a flawed map toward the chapel vault below the ninth bell rope.

steps.title: Threshold Test
steps.text: The entrance demands rope, torch, prayer, or blood before opening safely.

steps.title: First Chamber
steps.text: The architecture reveals who built this place and why they feared restless ancestors.

steps.title: Resource Drain
steps.text: Darkness, rot, hunger, or silence drains supplies and morale.

steps.title: Old Body
steps.text: A corpse from an earlier expedition reveals the final clue only appears after dusk.

steps.title: Choice of Depths
steps.text: One route is short and trapped; another is long and haunted.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: One route is short and trapped; another is long and haunted.

steps.title: Guardian Room
steps.text: A guardian tests whether the heir belongs below.

steps.title: Treasure With Teeth
steps.text: The objective is trapped, aware, or bound to the site.

steps.title: Escape Collapse
steps.text: Taking the chapel vault below the ninth bell rope wakes the final defense and turns the return into a chase.

steps.title: Surface Reckoning
steps.text: The guild pays, but the heir may carry a dungeon mark into later runs.

missions.name: The Laughing Quarry
missions.description: stonewright Hala  — a quarry echo that laughs before rockfall  — goat demons

steps.title: Kill Writ
steps.text: stonewright Hala posts a hunt for a quarry echo that laughs before rockfall; the writ warns that goat demons have learned human habits.

steps.title: Track Bed
steps.text: The heir finds tracks that do not match the creature's supposed shape.

steps.title: Bait Decision
steps.text: Use bought bait, personal blood, or a risky decoy to draw the quarry.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: Use bought bait, personal blood, or a risky decoy to draw th

steps.title: Hunter Becomes Hunted
steps.text: The quarry circles behind the heir, costing supplies or morale.

steps.title: Victim Remnant
steps.text: A survivor, bone, or torn charm reveals a rival heir already failed here and left a warning mark.

steps.title: Lair Threshold
steps.text: The lair terrain favors the quarry and demands a class or stat response.

steps.title: First Clash
steps.text: The heir wounds the target but learns it has a second form or hidden ally.

steps.title: Mercy Window
steps.text: A chance appears to spare, bind, or finish the target for different consequences.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: A chance appears to spare, bind, or finish the target for di

steps.title: Blood Price
steps.text: The final hunt resolves; failure can kill the heir outright.

steps.title: Trophy and Doubt
steps.text: The trophy earns rank XP, but the chronicle notes whether the kill was just.

missions.name: Ink Plague in the Clerkhouse
missions.description: widow Mara  — a plague spreading through signatures and seals  — debt spirits

steps.title: Containment Order
steps.text: widow Mara asks the heir to seal a plague spreading through signatures and seals before it spreads.

steps.title: Measure the Leak
steps.text: The heir maps how the curse, breach, or omen escapes into the town scene.

steps.title: Gather Components
steps.text: The seal needs salt, iron, ash, true names, or blood gathered under pressure.

steps.title: False Seal
steps.text: A prior seal failed because someone profited from weakness.

steps.title: Interruption
steps.text: debt spirits attack while the components are prepared.

steps.title: The Cost Named
steps.text: The working demands gold, HP, morale, an item, or a future secret debt.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: The working demands gold, HP, morale, an item, or a future s

steps.title: Lore Reversal
steps.text: The heir learns the safest route would abandon someone helpless, changing what must be sealed.

steps.title: Circle Holds
steps.text: A timed check determines whether the seal stabilizes or backlashes.

steps.title: Last Nail
steps.text: The heir chooses a merciful seal, a harsh seal, or a profitable unstable seal.

choices.label: Find Another Way
choices.subtitle: The heir chooses a merciful seal, a harsh seal, or a profita

steps.title: Quiet for Now
steps.text: The guild pays for containment; an unstable choice seeds a future event.
